resultList.dtldesc: ::Property details::::A stunning three-bedroom flat is now available for sale in the vibrant neighborhood of Kelambakkam, Chennai. With ongoing infrastructure projects and increasing demand for quality housing, Kelambakkam continues to be one of the most promising and sought-after localities in Chennai for real estate investment and comfortable living.::::
